name: SP8192 Parcae Trajectory Readout + Prefix TTT + Readout-Only Adaptation
author: Artem Buldin
technique_summary: SP8192 + Parcae-style loop reinjection + grouped trajectory readout + phased prefix legal TTT + readout-only evaluation-time adaptation
notes: Negative single-seed experiment. The overlay underperformed the full-TTT Parcae readout run and also exceeded the size limit with a 16,071,408-byte submission.
